chunks.title: Instructions for the Incense Altar
chunks.reason: Describes the construction and usage of the altar for burning incense.

chunks.title: The Census Atonement Money
chunks.reason: Details the half-shekel tax for the census to serve as atonement.

chunks.title: The Bronze Laver
chunks.reason: Commands the making of a laver for priestly washing before service.

chunks.title: The Holy Anointing Oil
chunks.reason: Lists ingredients and regulations for the sacred anointing oil.

chunks.title: The Holy Incense
chunks.reason: Describes the composition and usage of the sacred incense.
